title: TitaniumAddon
description: NeoForge Titanium adds titanium to Minecraft, a strong and versatile new metal for crafting powerful tools, armor, and blocks. Mine, craft, and build like never before with this shiny, durable resource!
body:
NeoForge Mod: Titanium

Upgrade your Minecraft adventures with NeoForge Titanium! This mod adds titanium, a strong and versatile new metal, perfect for crafting powerful tools, armor, and machinery.

Features:

Titanium Ore: Mine deep underground to find this rare and valuable resource.

Titanium Tools & Armor: Craft tools and armor stronger and more durable than Netherite.
